heading: Rules and regulations; standards of safety, convenience, and health
label: 1548 Rules and regulations; standards of safety, convenience, and health
text: The Secretary of Housing and Urban Development is authorized to make such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of subchapters II to VII of this chapter, and shall establish reasonable standards of safety, convenience, and health.
notes: References in TextSubchapters III and VI of this chapter, referred to in text, were comprised of sections 1531 to 1536 and 1571 to 1576, respectively, of this title and have been omitted from the Code. For further details, see note set out under .section 1522 of this title

Amendments1950—Act , substituted “Housing and Home Finance Administrator” and “Housing and Home Finance Agency” for “National Housing Administrator” and “National Housing Agency”, respectively, wherever appearing.Apr. 20, 1950
Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions to Secretary of Housing and Urban Development, see note set out under .section 1522 of this title
Transfer of FunctionsFunctions of Federal Works Administrator relating to defense housing consolidated with other agencies into National Housing Agency during World War II by Ex. Ord. No. 9070.
amendments: Amendments1950—Act , substituted “Housing and Home Finance Administrator” and “Housing and Home Finance Agency” for “National Housing Administrator” and “National Housing Agency”, respectively, wherever appearing.Apr. 20, 1950
